problem id: 663c19af
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(2) XOR SHL(6)

examples:
  00011010 -> 11101000
  00110101 -> 10010100
  01111110 -> 01111001
  10111000 -> 11100010
  01010101 -> 00010101
  10101001 -> 11100110
  00011111 -> 10111100
  10100101 -> 11010110

query: 00011000
predicted answer: 01100000
